headline: INTU Stock Rises 18.3% Post Q2 Earnings: Should You Buy or Sell?
summary: Intuit jumps 18% after reporting Q2 beat, as revenues climb 17% y/y and EPS rises 25%, with AI-driven products and small-business demand powering its growth outlook for 2026.

raw.headline: INTU Stock Rises 18.3% Post Q2 Earnings: Should You Buy or Sell?

headline: Is Autodesk Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Autodesk has underperformed the broader S&P 500 index over the past year. However, Wall Street analysts remain strongly optimistic about its prospects.

headline: If You Invested $1000 in Autodesk a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
summary: Why investing for the long run, especially if you buy certain popular stocks, could reap huge rewards.
